title: Implement Sunlit.place-inspired background gradients per theme
description: Full-page background gradients inspired by sunlit.place. Daylight: warm cream/gold. Dusk: amber/purple. Nighttime: dark subtle. Morning: cool pale.
acceptanceCriteria: Background covers viewport; gradients per theme
Background does not block interactions (pointer-events or z-index)

steps.description: Add background layer to body or root
steps.details: In styles.css or root layout, add fixed full-viewport background. Use background-image with linear-gradient or radial-gradient. Position: fixed, inset: 0, z-index: -1.
Use [data-theme='daylight'] body::before or similar. Daylight: warm cream to soft gold. Dusk: amber to soft purple. Nighttime: dark grays. Morning: pale blue-gray.
Run npm run dev, cycle themes, confirm each shows distinct gradient. Check mobile viewport.

technicalNotes: Sunlit.place uses dappled light, repeating gradients; adapt to simpler gradient for minimalism
Use mix-blend-mode sparingly if needed for warmth
